title: Pan-Seared Hake with Russian Flair
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish that combines the mild taste of hake with the bold flavors of Russian cuisine. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner or a special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Season the hake fillets with salt, pepper, and black pepper.
Add a small amount of butter to the grill and let it melt.
Sear the hake fillets for 3-4 minutes per side, or until they are cooked through.
Transfer the hake to a plate and cover with aluminum foil to keep warm.
Add the remaining butter to the grill and let it melt.
Pour in the Russian-style dill sauce and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Stir in the chopped fresh dill and grated lemon zest.
Serve the hake fillets with the dill sauce spooned over the top.
